---
title: "Your Name"
image: assets/headshot.jpg
toc: false
about:
  template: solana
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 14em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/your-profile
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/DangerX347
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:your.email@mail.dcu.ie
---

Welcome to my ePortfolio. I am a Business Studies student at Dublin City University with a keen interest in finance and data analytics.

This portfolio showcases my academic journey, technical skills, and professional development throughout the BAA1028 Workflow & Data Management module.

Feel free to explore my [projects](projects/index.qmd) or learn more [about me](about.qmd).
